name: skill-writer
description: Create, synthesize, and iteratively improve agent skills following the Agent Skills specification.
intent_triggers: use the skill writer agent skill
run a workflow for skill writer
我需要處理 skill writer 相關工作
幫我啟用 skill writer 這個 skill

examples.intent: Use the skill writer skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
